allow: PowerShell(npx playwright test home.spec.js smoke.spec.js 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4173 -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "stopped" } catch { "no preview" })
